visual_description: Several people in light-colored shirts stand with their backs to the camera in an office, looking at a wall-mounted monitor while one man holds a phone to his ear. Later, the view shifts to the inside of a vehicle, where raindrops on the windshield obscure a silhouette of a driver and green trees outside.
audio_description: Ambient office chatter can be heard, followed by the sound of rain on a windshield.
